content:
ITEM 3. LEGAL PROCEEDINGS
While not material to the Company, the Company makes the following [DATE_TIME] report of the general activities of the Company’s Antitrust Compliance Office as required by the Final Order and Judgment in [PERSON] v. [PERSON] et al, [LOCATION] District Court for the Western District of [LOCATION] (“Final Order”). For more information see http://aka.ms/MSLegalNotice2015. This will be the last annual report under the Final Order. During [DATE_TIME], the Antitrust Compliance Office (a) monitored the Company’s compliance with the European Commission Decision of [DATE_TIME], (“2004 Decision”) and with the Company’s Public Undertaking to the European Commission dated [DATE_TIME] (“2009 Undertaking”); (b) monitored, in the manner required by the Final Order, employee, customer, competitor, regulator, or other third-party complaints regarding compliance with the [DATE_TIME] Decision, the [DATE_TIME] Undertaking, or other EU or [LOCATION] laws or regulations governing tying, bundling, and exclusive dealing contracts; and, (c) monitored, in the manner required by the Final Order, the training of the Company’s employees regarding the Company’s antitrust compliance polices. In addition, the Antitrust Compliance Officer reports to the Regulatory and Public Policy Committee of the Board at each of its regularly scheduled meetings and to the full Board [DATE_TIME].
Refer to Note 15 - Contingencies of the Notes to Financial Statements (Part II, Item 8 of this Form 10-K) for information regarding legal proceedings in which we are involved.
ITEM 4.
